So the first or I guess traditionally the multifamily marketing plan is sort of a game of trial and error as you know, you know, so they're, you're trying multiple different ILSS to see what works and, you know, you'll have a problem property pop up or a handful of properties where it's just not getting the job done.

And then so the idea is let's, let's try something else and you're just stuck in this flywheel of trial and error cycling through different ILS contracts having between three and six different providers that you're working with in a month, your spend is competing against itself because as you know, like all these renters, they go to the same.
They don't just stop at one website, like they're scouring the web.

The first way was expanding our network.
